title: NEO 4.0 P4-AUTONOMY C1C3-S2b governance hash-manifest (I3/NF-2 rule-derived)
_home: <RunRoot>/governance_manifest.json - pinned at C5 by the supervisor, RE-VERIFIED every round before verdict aggregation (spec 0F4C8B81 sec 4 C1b I3/NF-2 + V1). Derived BY RULE: every governed file resolving a JUDGING class (constraint|test_harness|profile_risk) under the LIVE artifact_classes.json globs is a member. Persisted by S3; this slice (S2b) builds the derivation/verify engine + this schema.
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P4-C1C3-S2b. additionalProperties:false at every level; every field required; $id mandatory. members[] is deterministically sorted by rel. content_hash is lowercase sha256 hex of the member file body (Get-NeoSha256File). class is restricted to the three judging classes - a non-judging member can never appear (fail-closed derivation).
